explanation: The user's instruction is to go to the toaster. The toaster is located on the countertop_0, and based on the current state, it is already identified as an object in the environment. The robot is not currently holding any object, so no pick-up or placement is needed. The simplest and direct action is to navigate to the toaster. The old plan has already completed its step (placing breadsliced_0 on plate_0), so this new command is independent and only requires movement to the specified location.
